text: The provisions of this division apply upon highways and elsewhere throughout the State, unless expressly provided otherwise.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 10. ACCIDENTS AND ACCIDENT REPORTS [20000 - 20018]
### Chapter 1. Accidents and Accident Reports [20000 - 20018]
##### § 20000

The provisions of this division apply upon highways and elsewhere throughout the State, unless expressly provided otherwise.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of this division apply upon highways and elsewhere throughout the State, unless expressly provided otherwise.
